shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.subtitle: Please Read Shipping Policy Before Accessing Website.
shipping.intro: These Terms of Conditions set forth the standards of use of the Airport Home Appliance Online Service. By using the Supermargins / https://www.supermargins.in website, you (the “Customer”) agree to these terms and conditions. If you do not agree to the terms and conditions of this agreement, you should immediately cease all usage of this website. We reserve the right, at any time, to modify, alter, or update the terms and conditions of this agreement without prior notice. Modifications shall become effective immediately upon being posted at Supermargins / https://www.supermargins.in website. Your continued use of the Service after amendments are posted constitutes an acknowledgment and acceptance of the Agreement and its modifications. Except as provided in this paragraph, this Agreement may not be amended.

sections.title: 1. Description of Service
sections.content: Airport Home Appliance is providing Customers with product and order information. Customers must provide (1) all equipment necessary for their Internet connection, including computer and modem, (2) provide Customer access to the Internet, and (3) pay any fees related to such connection.

sections.title: 2. Intended For Users that are Residents of North America and are Over 18
sections.content: Our services are available and may only be used by individuals who are residents of North America and who are 18 years and older and who can form legally binding contracts under applicable law. You represent and warrant that You are at least 18 years old, that you reside in North America, and that all registration information You submit is accurate and truthful. You agree to comply with all local laws regarding online conduct and acceptable content.

sections.title: 3. Not for use by Residents of the European Union
sections.content: We do not accept customers who are residents of the European Union. This website may not be used by any resident of the European Union.

sections.title: 4. Accessibility
sections.content: If you are an American with a disability, we are here to provide assistance and support. Feel free to reach out to phone line at (866) 304-4449, press 1 for sales during regular business hours, where our friendly personal shoppers will be glad to assist you with navigating our website. They can help you conduct advanced searches, select items that match your desired specifications, and read out the specifications of any product. Furthermore, our personal shoppers can consult with you about the various products we offer. It's important to note that there is no charge for the help provided by our personal shoppers to any American with a disability. They are dedicated to ensuring you have a smooth shopping experience. Additionally, your personal shopper will take the time to explain our Privacy Policy and Terms of Service, and if you wish to make a purchase, they will guide you through the order placement process. We are committed to making your shopping experience as seamless and pleasant as possible.

sections.title: 5. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content: The site is provided by Airport Home Appliance on an “as is” and an “as available” basis. To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Airport Home Appliance makes no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, regarding the use or the results of this website in terms of its correctness, accuracy, reliability, or otherwise. Airport Home Appliance shall have no liability for any interruptions in the use of this Website. Airport Home Appliance disclaims all warranties regarding the information provided, including the implied warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion of implied warranties; therefore, the above-referenced exclusion is inapplicable.
